item.command:
/bin/zsh -lc "set -eu
file='longhorizon-work/rehearsal-B/config/policy.json'
jq -e '(.version | type) == \"number\" and (.mode | type) == \"string\" and (.retry_limit | type) == \"number\" and (.reviewers | type) == \"array\" and (.reviewers | map(type)) == [\"string\", \"string\"] and .version == 2 and .mode == \"strict\" and .retry_limit == 3 and .reviewers == [\"ada\", \"lin\"]' \""'$file" >/dev/null
actual_order=$(jq -r '"'keys_unsorted | join(\",\")' \""'$file")
[ "$actual_order" = '"'version,mode,retry_limit,reviewers' ]
printf 'types_values=PASS\\nkey_order=%s PASS\\n' \""'$actual_order"'

/bin/zsh -lc "set -eu
file='longhorizon-work/rehearsal-B/config/policy.json'
jq -e '(.version | type) == \"number\" and (.mode | type) == \"string\" and (.retry_limit | type) == \"number\" and (.reviewers | type) == \"array\" and (.reviewers | map(type)) == [\"string\", \"string\"] and .version == 2 and .mode == \"strict\" and .retry_limit == 3 and .reviewers == [\"ada\", \"lin\"]' \""'$file" >/dev/null
actual_order=$(jq -r '"'keys_unsorted | join(\",\")' \""'$file")
[ "$actual_order" = '"'version,mode,retry_limit,reviewers' ]
printf 'types_values=PASS\\nkey_order=%s PASS\\n' \""'$actual_order"'
